projectName: Dakin stroller huggers with music box
title: Dakin giraffe huggers — wind-up music box serviced
description: The giraffe’s wind-up music box would not run properly. We lubricated and repaired the movement so the lullaby plays again on the stroller toy.
itemDetails: Dakin stroller huggers with music box are nursery accessories from the Dakin plush tradition, with Dakin known historically for stuffed animals and baby gift lines in the late 20th century. Stroller-hugger formats were common in infant gifting and pram accessories. Construction usually combines soft plush fabric, hook-and-loop or tie attachment points, and a small pull-string or wind-up music module.
repairDetails: This Dakin stroller huggers set includes a giraffe with a wind-up music box that had seized. We lubricated and repaired the wind-up mechanism so the music plays smoothly again, and refreshed the plush as needed.
